title: Morning Briefing

briefing.ordering_note: Order ALL selected stories globally by heat score (hottest first). Do NOT group by source. Flagged (radar) and actively-exploited items should naturally rise to the top.

heat_rubric.when: Actively exploited in the wild / on CISA KEV / live zero-day
Critical severity (CVSS >= 9) or mass-impact breach (>100k records / major org)
Directly hits the reader's radar: AWS IAM/Identity Center/CloudWatch/SCP/CLI, Hyper-V/virtualization/VM security, healthcare/HIPAA, Puerto Rico infra/gov, banking regulation
Regulatory / compliance action: new rule, enforcement, fine, mandate
Cloud service change affecting production (AWS/Azure GA, deprecation, outage)
Strong community traction (high HN points/comments) — scaled

radar_flags: AWS IAM, Identity Center, CloudWatch, SCPs, or CLI
Healthcare IT, HIPAA, or medical data breaches
Active exploits, zero-days, or CISA KEV additions
Puerto Rico infrastructure or government tech

sources.name: CISA KEV
sources.note: JSON catalog of known-exploited CVEs; also see advisories RSS https://www.cisa.gov/cybersecurity-advisories/all.xml

sources.name: Dark Reading
sources.note: use rss.xml — /rss/all.xml now 404s and is Cloudflare-gated

sources.name: MSRC
sources.note: Windows / Hyper-V CVEs and Patch Tuesday

sources.name: Banking IT
sources.note: Banking/fintech tech + regulation. Alt regulation-focused feed: https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=(banking+OR+fintech)+(regulation+OR+compliance+OR+cybersecurity)+when:2d&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en

sources.name: Engadget
sources.note: Deprioritized (consumer). target 0 = not pulled; kept so historical briefings still render.
